title: codereview: 02a-coordinated-capacity.md missing cross-references and SFN definition
description: The new spec introduces SFN without defining it fully or updating references in 02-physical-link.md, 09-packets-timing.md, and 05-routing.md. Also, 'root-conflict' DIO option is mentioned but not specified in any RPL draft. This is a P1 spec completeness issue. Test vector files referenced do not exist yet.
